description: REAL FAILURE (scrubbed) — a venue-change notice for a show the user already holds tickets to. Not a purchase confirmation, so the old purchase-only prompt logged it as no_show. The forwarded email must still be tracked.

email.subject: Thank you for your order for Glass Beams - Moved from Sleeping Village
email.body:
An update about your event

Glass Beams

Your show has MOVED. Due to demand, Glass Beams has been relocated from Sleeping Village to Thalia Hall, Chicago, IL. Your existing tickets remain valid — no action needed.

New venue: Thalia Hall, 1807 S Allport St, Chicago, IL
Date: Friday, October 9, 2026
Doors: 8:00 PM

Order #DICE-7741203
View your tickets: https://dice.fm/tickets/7741203
